{{Quote|These are the last. Finish them and our Master's will is accomplished.|Darth Nihl to a group of Sith Lords|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 1">[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]]</ref>}}
A member of [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[One Sith]], this '''[[Mantellian Savrip/Legends|Mantellian Savrip]] Sith''' was one of many [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] led by [[Darth Nihl]] in the [[Massacre at Ossus]] in [[130 ABY]], purging the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] at [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] and scattering the [[New Jedi Order]].
